title: Office Support Executive (Central/ 6.2K)
description:
Office Support Executive (Central/ 6.2K)

Company Highlight

  • Join one of the world’s leading manufacturing giants and work with top-tier global clients.
  • Warm & Friendly Culture: We believe in kindness and supporting one another.
  • Growth Opportunities: We love to see our team members learn and level up.
  • Competitive Perks: Monthly salary and fixed 13 months (depending on experience), 15 AL (up to 25 days) plus medical benefits.


Job Scope

  • Meeting Master: You’ll own the Senior Management's calendar—booking rooms, prepping materials, taking notes, and making sure follow-up tasks are checked off.
  • Global Travel Guru: You’ll handle end-to-end travel plans (flights, visas, and fancy itineraries).
  • Office Vibe Manager: You’ll supervise our reception and manage our travel vendors. From booking staff trips to picking out festive office decorations and planning fun events, you keep our space lively!
  • Expat & Visitor Concierge: You’ll be the hero for our international guests and expat families. Whether it’s securing a work visa/ travel visa, finding a great home, or helping with utilities and medical checkups, you make their transition feel like home.

Requirement

  • The Organizer: You have a knack for keeping track of details and never letting a task slip through the cracks.
    The Communicator: You can explain things clearly and enjoy chatting with different types of people.
    The Tech-Savvy Learner: You’re comfortable with MS Office (especially Excel) and are happy to learn our internal booking/inventory software.
    The Proactive Thinker: If you see a way to make a process faster or better, you speak up!

We respect your privacy and all communication will be treated with confidentiality. If you wish to know more about this position or explore other roles, please prepare your updated profile and get in touch with our consultant at winnie.chen@manpower.com.sg

Thank you for your interest!

EA License No. 02C3423 Personnel Registration No. R1980765

postedCompany.description:
Manpower® is a global leader in contingent staffing and permanent resourcing, providing companies with strategic and operational flexibility and creating talent at scale.

As part of ManpowerGroup®, the world leader in innovative workforce solutions, we deliver high-impact strategies that help organizations achieve their business goals and enhance competitiveness.

Since 1996, Manpower Singapore has partnered with businesses to provide a continuum of staffing solutions—from incidental to strategic—helping them win in a rapidly changing world of work. At the same time, we empower jobseekers to find roles that match their skills and ambitions.

Our specialized recruiters leverage data-driven insights to assess, guide, and place people into meaningful, sustainable employment, enabling individuals to build rewarding careers while helping organizations thrive.

We work with hundreds of SMEs and multinational companies across diverse industries, including:

  • Banking & Finance
  • Corporate Finance & Accounting
  • Call Centers
  • Engineering
  • Events & Exhibitions
  • Healthcare
  • Hospitality
  • Information Technology
  • Life Sciences
  • Logistics & Supply Chain
  • Oil & Gas
  • Retail

Whether you’re looking for your next opportunity or seeking talent to power your business, Manpower Singapore creates powerful connections that unlock potential and drive success.

Learn more at manpower.com.sg or follow us on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/company/manpowersingapore/)

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.

Employment Agency License No.: 02C3423
